# requirements-ai.txt  (RECOMMENDED — generated by DEPENDENCY_AUDIT.md)
#
# HEAVY ML / CV stack. PROOF: every package below has ZERO imports in backend/**.py today
# (grep for cv2/sklearn/torch/transformers/sentence_transformers/matplotlib/seaborn = 0 files).
# The ai_assistant app uses postgres_rag.py (PostgreSQL RAG), NOT embeddings.
#
# => Do NOT install for a normal running system. Install ONLY when AI/embedding/vision features
#    are actually implemented and imported. This removes multi-GB download + native builds
#    (dlib/torch need cmake/compilers) from the default install with zero runtime impact.
#
# Install (with core):  pip install -r requirements-core.txt -r requirements-ai.txt

# --- Deep learning / NLP (transformers stack) ---
torch==2.9.1
transformers==4.57.3
sentence-transformers==5.2.0
tokenizers==0.22.1
safetensors==0.7.0
huggingface-hub==0.36.0
hf-xet==1.2.0

# --- Classic ML / plotting ---
scikit-learn==1.8.0
matplotlib==3.10.8
seaborn==0.13.2

# --- Computer vision ---
opencv-python==4.12.0.88

# NOTE: transitive deps (regex, filelock, fsspec, networkx, sympy, mpmath, triton,
# jinja2, MarkupSafe, tqdm) are auto-resolved by pip and intentionally NOT pinned here.
# Pin them only if you produce a frozen lockfile after verifying installation.
